title: Perspective Drawing Studio
description: 4-mode perspective drawing tool with VP snapping, draggable horizon, 6 tools, undo/redo, and PNG export.
concept: A full-canvas drawing studio with genuine perspective mechanics. Choose between 1-point VP, 2-point VP, isometric, or free mode — then draw lines that snap automatically to the correct vanishing-point direction. Drag the horizon line or VP markers to reshape the perspective on the fly. The 3D Box tool constructs a foreshortened box from a drag. Save your work to localStorage or export a clean PNG without guide markers.
features: 4 drawing modes: 1-VP, 2-VP, Isometric, Free — switch any time
6 tools: perspective line (VP-snap), freehand, 3D box, ellipse, ruler, eraser
Draggable vanishing-point markers and horizon line
Perspective grid overlay with mode-matched ray pattern
Undo/redo (40 levels), Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y, tool hotkeys
Export PNG (no guide markers) · Save/load via localStorage

interaction.mouse: Click-drag to draw; hover near VP markers or horizon to drag them
interaction.click: Toolbar buttons select tools/mode; color swatch opens color picker
interaction.touch: Full pointer-event support; touch drag draws or moves guides
interaction.keyboard: Ctrl+Z undo, Ctrl+Y redo; l/f/b/e/r/x for tool shortcuts
